note: Heads up: your with_counts changes aren't visible in my copy of filters.py (grep shows 0 matches) - looks like we're each in isolated sandboxes rather than a truly shared working tree, even though the path is the same. I've finished and finalized my own patch with just case_sensitive (signature: sync_do_groupby(environment, value, attribute, default=None, case_sensitive=False), same for async do_groupby), scoped only to my assigned feature, all 837 tests pass. Recommend you do the same for with_counts in your own sandbox/patch - no further action needed on my end. Good luck!
